metadata.source: Maharashtra State CET Cell — Government of Maharashtra
metadata.quota_note: Maharashtra State seats (85% of intake). merit_no = MH State Merit Number. percentile = MHT-CET PCM percentile.

record_schema.quota: MS = Maharashtra State (85% seats) | AI = All India (15% seats)
record_schema.seat_type: Seat grouping (State Level / Home University / Other Than HU…)
record_schema.stage: Allotment stage: I | II | III | VII | I-Non

cutoffs._note: Only categories with seats allotted appear. Empty cells are omitted.
cutoffs.merit_no: Closing merit number (MS: MH State merit | AI: All India JEE rank)
cutoffs.percentile: Closing score in brackets (MS: MHT-CET percentile | AI: JEE Main score)

category_legend.how_to_read: Format: [Prefix][Category][Suffix]. Example: GOPENS = G(General) + OPEN(Open/General) + S(State Level). LSCS = L(Ladies) + SC(Scheduled Caste) + S(State Level).

stage.I-Non: Stage I-Non — Non-PWD or Non-Defence sub-stage
